markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and approve the proposed content strategy and topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposed six topic clusters to target market gaps and Parloa's strategic goals, including agentic AI, contact center transformation, and competitive comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [A key strategic decision is pending: targeting "conversational AI" keywords. While highly competitive (e.g., "voice AI" has a 100 difficulty score), the topic has high search volume (\~250k/mo) and is critical for owning the conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [The strategy will tightly integrate with paid media (Quincy), using organic content to support paid landing pages and reallocate budget from expensive keywords to SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Dora will secure CEO approval for the "conversational AI" cluster and share the strategy with Quincy to align efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

## Topics

### Competitor Analysis & Market Gaps

  - [Analysis of \~80k keywords across 6 competitors (Eleven Labs, Sierra AI, Cognigy, Decagon AI, Core AI, Poly AI) informed the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**Key Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [**Sierra AI:** Focuses on thought leadership and high-profile case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [**Decagon AI:** Owns the glossary space. Parloa can compete directly, as its Domain Authority (35) is close to Decagon's (39).](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Cognigy:** Positions itself as the enterprise leader, leveraging Gartner recognition and competitor comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [**Core AI:** Differentiates with deep technical content.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

### Proposed Content Strategy & Topic Clusters

  - [**1. Conversational AI & Voice Tech**](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
    
      - [**Goal:** Establish Parloa as the trusted educator, reinforcing its voice-first differentiator.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [**Narrative:** Most vendors start with chat; Parloa is built voice-first for superior quality.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
      - [**Status:** Pending CEO approval. Dora will present data showing high search volume (\~250k/mo) to make the case.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

  - [**2. Agentic AI & Technical Thought Leadership**](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
    
      - [**Goal:** Position Parloa at the forefront of agentic AI and demonstrate technical expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Audience:** CX leaders, transformational AI leaders, and product teams.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
      - [**Keywords:** Agentic AI, multi-agent, AI agent architecture, human in the loop.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

  - [**3. Enterprise Contact Center Transformation**](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
    
      - [**Goal:** Position Parloa as the partner that scales AI from pilot to production, avoiding "failed AI pilots."](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [**Audience:** CX leaders and heads of AI.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [**Keywords:** Enterprise AI platform, contact center automation, scaling agentic AI.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)

  - [**4. Operational Metrics & Glossary**](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
    
      - [**Goal:** Own operational metric conversations to show deep CX/contact center understanding.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
      - [**Format:** Glossary-style content (Phase 1 articles, Phase 2 dedicated glossary).](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Creates internal linking opportunities to boost SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

  - [**5. Industry Vertical Solutions**](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
    
      - [**Goal:** Demonstrate deep expertise within specific verticals.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Hyper-specific content drives higher-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [**Keywords:** AI voice agent in healthcare, AI for insurance, retail AI solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)

  - [**6. Competitive Comparisons & Alternatives**](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
    
      - [**Goal:** Own the conversation for middle/bottom-of-funnel buyers in the consideration phase.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High-intent traffic, even with lower search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
      - [**Action:** Create SEO-optimized versions of paid-only comparison pages (e.g., CIRA).](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)

### Paid & Organic Strategy Integration

  - [**Rationale:** Tightly integrated paid and organic efforts are more effective and cost-efficient.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [**Organic → Paid:** Create content supporting paid landing pages to improve their SEO authority and Google Quality Score.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [**Paid → Organic:** Reallocate budget from expensive keywords to SEO, reducing overall CAC.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Dora:**](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [Secure CEO approval for the "conversational AI" topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [Share the strategy document with Quincy (paid media agency) to align efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=2063.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
      - [Send questions for the product deep dive to Dora for consolidation with Lionhurst's questions.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
      - [Deliver the calibration article and refined artifacts in Week 3.](https://fathom.video/share/PuKuezZWz3Hc_QqRgaarU9xCtJ7iUjjA?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
